title: "Unveiling Halloween: The Symbolism Behind Iconic Creatures"
description: The article provides an insightful analysis of various Halloween characters, including ghosts, witches, vampires, zombies, werewolves, Frankenstein's Monster, and mummies, discussing their cultural significance and the fears they symbolize. It highlights how these characters represent themes such as the thinning veil between life and death, the fear of the unknown, the power of nature, the consequences of scientific hubris, and the fear of losing control.
